title: CraftNectar S1
description: modpack for the CraftNectsr server for season 1
body:
the offical modpack for CraftNectar smp season 1!

dive into create mod and its addon, pvp with better comabat, and do way more fun stuff.


join the discord to join the server, click [here](https://discord.gg/S3BU4K5yD7)

join the server, it has a skyblock, a survival world, a minigames area and even a pvp arena!
so what are u waiting for? join now!

allocated ram:
minimum ram: 2gb
recommended ram: 4gb

if you have a low end device consider downloading https://modrinth.com/project/craftnectar-optimized instead
